attrs.aria-label: Go to next page of document

attrs.alt: Hire right the first time, with LinkedIn Hiring Pro Meet LinkedIn Hiring Pro — it’s not just another job board, it’s your hiring partner, designed to simplify hiring and deliver qualified candidates. We know that for small businesses like yours, every hire and every hour counts. And just screening and shortlisting candidates for a single role can take several days. What if you could cut that time dramatically and still make the perfect hire? Meet LinkedIn Hiring Pro, an all-in-one agentic solution that helps manage your hiring workflow. Hiring Pro customers report saving an average of 6.4 hours per week.* Here’s how it works: Describe the role you need to fill.1 Review your draft job description and ideal qualifications created by LinkedIn Hiring Pro. Make edits or continue as is. 2

“I used LinkedIn Hiring Pro to hire an in-house graphic designer who had the exact design skills I was looking for. The AI surfaced him as a top fit right away, and even highlighted his portfolio. As a one-woman HR team, I felt like I had a “mini-assistant” giving me time back to focus on work that really impacts our employees, like candidate conversations and payroll.” Brooke Bayerl, HR generalist, Vyper Industrial Start hiring with LinkedIn Hiring Pro today. Get started *Among customers who report time savings with LinkedIn Hiring Pro. Copyright © 2026 LinkedIn Corporation. LinkedIn, the LinkedIn logo, and InMail, are registered trademarks of LinkedIn Corporation in the United States and/or other countries. All other brands and names are the property of their respective owners. All rights reserved. Hiring Pro begins finding candidates in LinkedIn's network that match your job description and ideal qualifications. You get 25 candidates sourced daily. 3 Hiring Pro screens candidates against your qualifications and shortlists them into a top fit list. You can describe what you need in plain language to refine the list. 4 Invite your top applicants to an AI- screening interview so you can further narrow down your shortlist and focus only on the most qualified candidates. 5 LinkedIn Hiring Pro provides real-time updates on your job post status and guides you through each step of the hiring process. 6 Nearly 60% of hirers found a candidate to interview in the first week using LinkedIn Hiring Pro.
